title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in Union, NJ
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Union, NJ. Humane bat extraction, cleanup, and prevention. Licensed experts serving Union Township. Call now for fast service!
intro: Bats in your Union, New Jersey home or business require immediate professional attention. Our bat removal and exclusion services safely extract bats from attics, chimneys, and wall voids while ensuring they cannot re-enter. With pricing ranging from $900 to $2,500, we provide comprehensive solutions tailored to Union properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Union Township and surrounding New Jersey communities for years with specialized bat removal expertise. Our licensed technicians use humane exclusion methods, thorough sanitization, and guaranteed prevention strategies to protect your property and family from bat infestations.
localContext: Union's mix of historic colonial homes along Colonial Avenue and modern residential developments near Kean University often experience bat intrusions, especially in older attics and roof structures. The township's tree-lined neighborhoods and proximity to parks like Kawameeh Park make properties particularly attractive to roosting bat colonies seeking shelter.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Union typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the colony size, entry points, extent of damage, and necessary repairs. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Union legal and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bat removal methods comply with New Jersey wildlife regulations and use humane exclusion techniques. We use one-way valves that allow bats to exit but prevent re-entry, never trapping or harming bats, especially during maternity season from May through August.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Union home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or squeaking sounds in attics at dusk or dawn, dark stains near entry points, accumulation of bat droppings (guano) in attics or around the home's exterior, and strong ammonia-like odors from urine buildup.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bats from my Union property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day inspections for Union residents. The exclusion process typically takes 1-3 days for installation, with bats fully evacuating within 3-7 days. Complete cleanup, sanitization, and sealing work is usually finished within one week of initial contact.
